meeting.transcript: The customer explained that service teams use separate systems for tickets, renewals, and account notes. Managers want a clearer weekly view of delayed work, customer risk, and recommended next steps before renewal conversations begin.

salesperson_notes.content: The account team believes an executive sponsor may join the next meeting, but the customer has not confirmed this yet.

known_constraints.description: The customer wants an initial recommendation before quarterly planning.

meeting.transcript: The customer described a manual reporting process where plant metrics are copied from ERP exports and quality logs into weekly spreadsheets. They want to understand whether cleaner data pipelines could support faster operational reviews and fewer reporting errors.

salesperson_notes.content: The sales team has not confirmed whether IT owns integration work for this initiative.

known_constraints.description: ERP access requires approval from the internal IT team.
